def positive_repeated_hashlib_new_same_algorithm():
    rule_id = "repeated_hashlib_new_same_algorithm"
    family = "hot_path_ext"
    severity = "info"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "The same hashing algorithm is repeatedly constructed in a loop or tight path."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
